name_en: Celine Triomphe Bucket Bag, a bag I fell in love with at first sight. It's very special but not flashy. It's the right choice for low-key girls. The bag itself is very light, the bottom is structured so it doesn't deform, and it looks more premium. It's very easy to match, and can be sweet or edgy! Dimensions: Large 24 27 Small 20 22. Item No.: Large 6071 Small 6070
